scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=indras-book --branch=main
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=indras-book --branch=preview
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=indras-book --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
